user_query: I want to fetch the latest coupons, trending offers, and popular deals for my shopping spree, and also provide free coupon codes.

TaskList.description: Fetch the latest coupons available from various online stores.
Retrieve trending offers and popular deals from the selected shopping platforms.
Generate a list of free coupon codes that can be used during the shopping spree.
Compile all the fetched coupons, trending offers, and free coupon codes into a single document or list.
